upstream_tracking.issue: Reserved-name collision: an API resource named 'profile' hard-fails generation (reserved template) instead of auto-suffixing (compare: 'analytics'/'auth' auto-rename to here-now-analytics/here-now-auth). here.now's spec needed x-pp-resource=profile_resource by hand.

x-pp-resource values containing an underscore leak the underscore into generated Example strings while Cobra normalizes the command name to hyphenated form, producing dogfood 'missing runnable example' happy_path failures. Generator should hyphenate Example command paths to match the normalized command name, or reject underscore x-pp-resource values.

Generator scaffolds novel features but mis-parents them: drive sync/diff registered under a new singular 'drive' group and sites stale / publish resume at top level instead of under their resource parents.

Dependent-resource typed upsert (upsertFilesTx/upsertDataTx) rolls back on the parent-id NOT NULL constraint when sync injects parent_id instead of drives_id/publishes_id (TestUpsertBatch_Sets{Files,Data}ParentID). Generator template bug in internal/store/store.go.

generator de-slugs collision-renamed resource names into space-separated fallback descriptions, mangling brand names that contain non-alphanumerics (here.now -> 'here now'). Should use the narrative display_name, or skip de-slugging for renamed resources.
